title: sophoclesia major
side_effects: Sophoclesia major can have side effects if used improperly, such as rapid heartbeat, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to liver damage, seizures, and respiratory failure. Some users have reported allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Additionally, long-term misuse can result in permanent damage to the kidneys and digestive system.
